name: 4q12_PDGFRA_KIT_KDR_locus
description: 4q12 type-III receptor tyrosine kinase cluster — PDGFRA, KIT, KDR/VEGFR2 lie in a ~600 kb tandem block. Kinase and Ig-like ectodomains share 60-80% protein identity, and at least three intragenic SDs of ~5-10 kb sit in PDGFRA introns. Site of the FIP1L1-PDGFRA fusion (cryptic ~800 kb deletion) causing hypereosinophilic syndrome.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem block of PDGFRA-KIT-KDR at ~5 Mb spacing; kinase domains 60-80% protein identity; short intragenic SDs in PDGFRA introns; recurrent ~800 kb interstitial deletion creates FIP1L1-PDGFRA fusion.
